data.title: VanEck Sees Bitcoin Reaching Multi-Million Valuation by 2050
data.description:
Asset manager VanEck has laid out an aggressive long-term outlook for Bitcoin, projecting that a single coin could be worth more than $2. 9 million by 2050 under its base-case assumptions. The forecast appears in the firm’s Long-Term Capital Market Assumptions report, which models Bitcoin’s role in a changing global financial system
source: https://www.ethnews.com/vaneck-sees-bitcoin-reaching-multi-million-valuation-by-2050/

data.title: Pump.fun says creator fees ‘may have skewed’ incentives, plans revamp
data.description:
Pump. fun is introducing a new creator fee sharing system that lets teams and CTO admins split fees across up to 10 wallets, transfer coin ownership and revoke update authority.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/pumpfun-revamps-creator-fees-fee-sharing-cto-controls?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Sol Meme's WhiteWhale coin's market capitalization surged past $140 million, a short-term increase of over 20%.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of Solana chain's Meme coin, WhiteWhale, surged past $140 million, reaching a high of approximately $141 million, setting a new all-time high with a short-term increase of over 20%. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: Solana Urges Validators to Upgrade to Latest Version Amid Critical Patches
data.description: According to Foresight News, Solana Status has issued an urgent notification recommending all mainnet beta validator nodes to upgrade to version v3.0.14. This update includes a series of critical patches applicable to both staked and unstaked nodes.

data.title: BNY Mellon Launches Tokenized Deposits on Digital Assets Platform
data.description:
BNY Mellon introduces tokenized deposits, enabling on-chain fund transfers, with ICE and Citadel among participants.
source: https://coincu.com/news/bny-mellon-tokenized-deposits-launch/

data.title: Tether Partners With UN to Expand Crypto Crime Prevention in Africa
data.description:
Tether is deepening its role in global enforcement efforts after a major Interpol-led operation in Africa resulted in the seizure of $260 million in illicit funds. The stablecoin issuer has entered a new partnership with the United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime aimed at strengthening crypto crime prevention across the continent.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/tether-partners-with-un-to-expand-crypto-crime-prevention-in-africa/

data.title: NFT Paris 2026 Canceled Amid NFT Market Downturn
data.description:
NFT Paris 2026 is canceled a month before the event due to NFT market declines, with attendee refunds promised and sponsor reimbursements uncertain.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/nft-paris-2026-canceled-amid-nft-market-downturn/

data.title: Legislation Proposed to Restrict Federal Officials from Betting on Prediction Markets
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. Representative Ritchie Torres, a Democrat from New York, and former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi have introduced legislation aimed at preventing federal officials from participating in prediction markets. The newly unveiled Financial Prediction Markets Public Integrity Act of 2026 seeks to prohibit federal elected officials, political appointees, executive branch employees, and congressional staff from buying, selling, or exchanging prediction market contracts related to government policies, actions, or political outcomes. This restriction applies if they possess or could reasonably acquire significant non-public information through their official duties.

data.title: This morning, $23.1 million worth of ONDO tokens were distributed to four wallets, and historical data suggests they may flow to exchanges.
data.description: According to onchainschool's monitoring, $23.1 million worth of ONDO tokens were transferred from a suspected team address and distributed to four wallets in the early hours of today. Historical data shows that these four wallets have been depositing ONDO tokens into exchanges in batches, and the latest transfer of tokens may also be transferred to exchanges.

data.title: Nasdaq and CME Relaunch Crypto Index Partnership
data.description:
Nasdaq and CME deepen partnership, reintroducing the Nasdaq CME Crypto Index for transparent institutional investing in digital assets.
source: https://coincu.com/news/nasdaq-cme-crypto-index-partnership/

data.title: Jim Cramer tells investors to avoid Apple and Nvidia stocks right now
data.description:
Jim Cramer says this is not the moment to chase Apple or Nvidia. He says the message is being missed because traders keep staring at jobs numbers that did nothing. The latest unemployment report came and went without surprises. To him, that calm matters. It lets the market show where money is really moving, and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jim-cramer-says-avoid-apple-nvidia-stocks/

data.title: ETH OG deposited 40,200 ETH, worth $124 million, into the CEX over the past two days.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, an ETH OG (f96e...7a6c) is continuously selling ETH. This address previously purchased 154,076 ETH at an average price of $517, and in the past two days, it deposited another 40,251 ETH into Bitstamp, worth $124 million. Currently, this address still holds 26,000 ETH, worth $80.15 million.

data.title: BSC Chain Meme coin "Laozi" surges over 730 times in a single day, with its market capitalization now at $5.86 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the BSC chain's Meme coin, nicknamed "Laozi," surged over 730 times in a single day, briefly exceeding $6 million in market capitalization, and currently stands at approximately $5.86 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: Inside Coinbase’s 2025 Trading Expansion Across Spot and Derivatives
data.description:
Rather than relying on one standout product, Coinbase spent 2025 scaling in every direction at once.
source: https://coindoo.com/inside-coinbases-2025-trading-expansion-across-spot-and-derivatives/

data.title: Trump meets oil execs at the White House, demands $100 billion for Venezuela
data.description:
Donald Trump gathered top oil bosses in the Oval last night and straight up demanded that they give him $100 billion for Venezuelan crude. The US leader pulled the heads of Exxon, Chevron, Repsol, and Eni into the White House and told them Venezuela was open for business; his business. “You’re dealing with us directly. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-oil-execs-100-billion-for-venezuela/

data.title: ‘Big Short’ investor Mike Burry says he holds put options against Oracle stock
data.description:
Mike Burry is going after Oracle now. The man known for his infamous short on the housing market in 2008 says he’s holding put options on the tech giant. He made the reveal late Friday in a Substack post. A put is a bet that pays when the stock price falls. And according to Burry, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mike-burry-put-options-against-oracle-stock/

data.title: Bitdeer sold 137.9 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings down to 1,990.9 BTC.
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of January 9, its total Bitcoin holdings had decreased to 1,990.9 BTC. This week, its mining output was 137.7 BTC, but it sold 137.9 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net decrease of approximately 99.1 BTC in its total Bitcoin holdings.

data.title: Anti-DeFi group runs ads urging public to pressure Senators on crypto bill: Report
data.description:
A series of ads reportedly aired on Fox, urging the public to contact their senators to remove DeFi provisions from the crypto market structure bill.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/anti-defi-group-runs-ads-to-strip-defi-from-crypto-bill?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Dragonfly exec says stablecoin cards will be a defining crypto theme of 2026
data.description:
Stablecoin-based payment cards are poised to be a major cryptocurrency trend in 2026, as transaction volumes surged 72% to $33 trillion.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/stablecoin-cards-will-define-2026/

data.title: Zama is now open for public sale registration.
data.description: The privacy computing project Zama Protocol announced that it has officially opened registration for the Zama public sale to investors, and eligible users can participate in the subsequent public sale process.
